center.name: 瑪麗亞群島
center.summary: 瑪麗亞群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Golden vireo，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: sordidus is found only on the Tres Marías Islands off Nayarit. The species inhabits deciduous and gallery forest, arid to semi-humid scrublands, and plantations in the tropical zone.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C
